sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82361" key="peritexna/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτεχν-άομαι</orth>, <sense id="n82361.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contrive with greatcunning</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
